name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Initialize Codex projects, plan multi-source context rebuilds, read and refresh private project context, aggregate registered project portfolios, search and review Codex chats, and manage sessions, decisions, memos, freshness, and distillation.

interface.shortDescription: Read and maintain private Codex project context
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for project initialization through .tkn/codex-context.yaml, read-only multi-source rebuild planning, current-project orientation from private working dashboards, project-scoped refresh from named Codex chat archives, registered-project portfolio aggregation, sessions, decisions, memos, cross-project chat search and review, distillation, and freshness audits.
defaultPrompt: Read this project's current working context
Refresh this project's session notes, decisions, and working context from Codex chat history
Write a private portfolio dashboard from all registered project working contexts
